mapper.select: SELECT * FROM event_participant WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM event_participant WHERE phone = #{phone} AND DATE(reg_date) = CURDATE() LIMIT 1
SELECT test_drive_time AS testDriveTime, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM event_participant WHERE DATE(reg_date) = CURDATE() AND test_drive_time != '시승 미신청' GROUP BY test_drive_time
